transcript: Good afternoon Breakpoint. I'm Erbil Karaman, co-founder of Huma Finance, the first PayFi network. PayFi connects real-world payments with stablecoin liquidity to accelerate global money movement. The use cases are very obvious. Credit cards: we have been one of the early backers of some of the most successful stablecoin cards that has been growing, taking over the world. Cross-border prefunding, remittances: we dominate this industry. We replace correspondent banking and overdraft facilities. Merchant settlements: we announced a solution for Amazon's payout partners in Asia, where most of the buyers in Amazon are in the US, but most of the sellers are in Asia. It used to take forever to get the payments to merchants. Now with our solutions, they can get paid in the same day. And trade finance, which we're launching into very soon. All of this together give us an opportunity of a 30 trillion dollar market to go and dominate. And even though we kicked off the PayFi initiative literally about a year ago with Solana Foundation, today all major payment companies are embracing PayFi solutions one way or another. But we don't want to stop there. For us, it's not enough just to build on-chain financial solutions. We need to integrate into the daily flows of existing payment networks and existing businesses. Fintechs took over the world through embedded finance. We believe we're going to take over the world through embedded on-chain finance. Another example of this is that you have seen Tala embedded into the fintechs of the world. We can onboard tens of millions of users at a time by utilizing our solutions inside a simple app that people can understand and use. We also announced a strategic partnership with Obligate and TradeFlow, providing stablecoin liquidity to commodity flows while generating predictable, uncorrelated institutional yield. This is the first time there is a fully digitized end-to-end solution with real-time monitoring all the way built into the containers carrying rare earth minerals. Commodity trade is about 25% of world's GDP. All of that to say, we're just getting started. We have done about 8.5 billion dollars in transactions, growing at about 1 billion a month. Zero dollars in credit defaults to date. The protocol also grew in terms of one of the top yield sources on Solana and across the DeFi ecosystems with more than 100,000 depositors into our liquidity pools. Today you're going to find our yield-bearing LP token, PST, constantly returning a yield that hasn't been seen in the industry before. That makes us one of the top USDC yield opportunities on Binance Wallet. PST is also a collateral asset on some of the largest DeFi lending platforms on Solana: Kamino and Jupiter Lend. This gives you an opportunity called looping. I love looping. On the right, you're going to see my personal portfolio. Not financial advice. I'm generating about 37%. I can't recommend this to our institutional partners. They are usually wary of the liquidation risk that exists in these looping vaults. And to address that, we are building a solution called Defensive Looping, addressing and isolating every single major risk. We see a massive opportunity to onboard institutions to actually utilize looping without being subject to simple liquidation risks that exist today. One of those is underlying assets risk. What happens if there is an impairment to the underlying asset? We're building a reserve that's going to utilize idle, staked, native tokens to protect against this impairment risk. The vaults are going to subscribe into the reserve, giving some of their yield back to the stakers, and the stakers will provide deterministic protection for certain amount of liquidations. The second one is PST depeg. So we have seen with Ethena that even USDe, you know, being billions of dollars in scale, can have secondary markets depeg with their primary market valuation. So we're building an arbitrage bot to make sure the secondary markets and primary markets are always in sync. The last one is the borrowing cost and native yield mismatch. Because borrowing cost in DeFi markets can change literally every single minute. This means that you can wake up one morning and you can see most of your PnL has gone to negative. This is called negative carry risk. And we're building what we call the Vault Watchdog. So it's going to monitor your portfolio, it's going to monitor the DeFi borrowing rate, and adjust your lever. It's going to lever up or lever down depending on this spread between the DeFi borrowing rate and the original yield of the underlying asset. We called this Project Flywheel a few months ago, we started working hard on it. And now, Huma Multiply, the first pilot, is launching December 29. We are still onboarding launch partners for our public launch coming in Q1. Come talk to us, to Huma team, myself and my team around here. Let's fucking go. Thank you.

sources.title: River’s Actions and Follow-Up on the Recent Market Event
sources.snippet:
[Announcement](https://blog.river.inc/tag/announcement/)·Nov 10, 2025·3 min read

# River’s Actions and Follow-Up on the Recent Market Event

Why We Temporarily Suspended River Pts Conversion

- [River](https://blog.river.inc/author/river/)

Over the past few days, River Pts price experienced extreme volatility. and we know many of you are frustrated, disappointed, and even angry.

Before anything else, we want to say this clearly: we understand how you feel — and we feel the same way.

What happened was not ordinary market movement.

It was an organized, coordinated attack targeting the River ecosystem and its River Pts conversion mechanism.

TL;DR

- A coordinated market manipulation targeted $RIVER through large short positions and concentrated Pts conversions.
- To prevent systemic collapse, the team temporarily suspended Pts conversion and executed market buybacks.
- Attackers quickly closed short positions following the suspension.
- We are now upgrading the mechanism, releasing data, and hosting an AMA to share our next steps.

### What Happened

Starting on Nov 7, we observed unusual and suspicious activity across multiple exchanges:

- Large short positions were opened simultaneously.
- Massive amounts of River Pts were converted to RIVER and immediately sold.
- Funding rates turned sharply negative.

This mirrored a “Soros-style attack”, where aggressors exploit weak liquidity conditions to create pressure on both spot and derivatives markets — triggering a chain reaction of panic and loss of confidence.

At first, we responded by buying back RIVER from the market to stabilize liquidity and sentiment.

However, when the same pattern reappeared on Nov 9, it became clear this was a deliberate, repeated manipulation — not random volatility.

RIVER Funding Rate

### Why We Temporarily Suspended River Pts Conversion

We know this was a painful and controversial decision.

Pausing conversion can make holders feel trapped — and we don’t take that lightly.

But leaving the mechanism open would have allowed attackers to amplify the pressure loop, using short positions and conversion flows to drain liquidity and collapse confidence entirely.

If we had done nothing, the likely outcome was a self-reinforcing spiral leading to total market failure.

It was, quite literally, a trolley-problem moment:

Do we stand by and watch the entire ecosystem collapse — or do we pull the brake to protect the long-term interests of the majority?

We chose the latter.

**After the suspension, we observed attackers closing their shorts rapidly, confirming that the decision successfully prevented a deeper crash.**

### Taking Responsibility and Next Steps

We fully acknowledge our responsibility in this.

This incident exposed a structural weakness in the River Pts conversion design — one we must now strengthen.

Here’s what we’re doing next:

1. Redesigning the River Pts conversion mechanism with improved risk controls to prevent coordinated exploitation.
2. Publishing on-chain and exchange data to explain the event transparently.
3. Hosting a community AMA – We will take responsibility, address the issues promptly, and listen carefully to community feedback.
4. Continuing strategic buybacks and stabilization measures before reopening conversion under a safer model.

### To Our Community and Holders

We hear your criticism and frustration. We know that trust is earned through actions, not words — and we intend to prove that over time.

We have never engaged in short-term trading or profit-seeking behavior.

We have turned down multiple offers for “volatility-driven” partnerships because we believe RIVER should grow organically and sustainably.

$RIVER price action since TGE: short-term volatility and long-term vision

This attack was a harsh reminder — but it also showed us what kind of project we want to be:

Transparent, resilient, and focused on long-term value.

To everyone who continues to stand with us — thank you.

We will keep moving for

Today marks an important milestone for Stable and for the broader stablecoin economy. Stable Mainnet is officially live, activating StableChain, our USDT-native Layer 1 designed for high-volume, predictable stablecoin settlement.
This moment represents more than a technical release: it is the beginning of dedicated infrastructure for the stablecoin economy. As we move into this next phase, we want to outline the thesis that guides our work and the role StableChain will play in shaping the future of digital value movement.
Learn more about StableChain:[www.stable.xyz](http://www.stable.xyz)
## **Stable Thesis, Why Stable?**
With Stable Mainnet going live today, we are entering an important moment for both Stable and the broader stablecoin economy. Mainnet marks the point where dedicated stablecoin infrastructure moves from concept to reality, and with it, the opportunity to redefine how stable value moves across the world.
Stablecoins have become one of the world’s most widely adopted digital assets, yet the infrastructure that carries them has not evolved at the pace of their usage. They are used globally, across industries and economies, but they still rely on base layers built for purposes other than payments.
This gap is no longer sustainable.
Stable’s mission is to deliver dedicated payment infrastructure designed around how stablecoins are actually used: to move value quickly, reliably, and with predictable costs. With StableChain, we are advancing that mission: providing a foundation where stablecoin transactions are not secondary activity, but the core function of the system.
Stable Mainnet represents the beginning of this new phase.
**Fast, Secure, Predictable.**
## **Growing Ecosystem of Day-1 Partners**

# [![Solana Company - Main - Black.png](https://ml.globenewswire.com/Resource/Download/1986b97e-8656-4213-9218-ae51324d696d?size=3)](https://www.solanacompany.co/)
# Solana Company Announces Intent to Tokenize HSDT Shares on Superstate’s Opening Bell
November 12, 2025 08:30 ET| Source:[Solana Company](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/search/organization/Solana%20Company)FollowSolana Company
Share
* * * * * * * * NEWTOWN, Pa., Nov. 12, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Solana Company (NASDAQ: HSDT) (the “Company” or “HSDT”), a publicly listed company that has expanded its business to include a digital asset treasury dedicated to acquiring and holding Solana (SOL), today announced its plans to tokenize shares of its HSDT fund on[Superstate](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=WCL2jv2WHVrGZ33XGo1sAeEfAq8FyCXbWQqngjLTMK_TY4QsZ0isV15p3IWP4i7G2cToj70PD5ma-72qy87nqA==)’s Opening Bell platform. The initiative marks a major step forward in the Company’s strategy to modernize access to capital markets through regulated, onchain infrastructure.
Upon launch, shareholders will be able to hold and transfer tokenized representations of HSDT shares on Superstate’s Opening Bell, enabling 24/7 trading, real-time settlement, and enhanced global liquidity. The tokenized HSDT will retain its current regulatory structure and investor protections while gaining the efficiency and accessibility of blockchain technology.
“The tokenization of HSDT through Superstate represents a major step toward realizing the vision of global, around-the-clock capital markets, and we believe the majority of that activity will take place on Solana,” said Cosmo Jiang, General Partner at Pantera Capital and Board Director at Solana Company. “Blockchain infrastructure will underpin the next evolution of traditional finance, and Solana Company’s leadership in bringing tokenized assets to market exemplifies the kind of forward thinking that will define this new era.”
The partnership underscores Solana Company’s commitment to driving innovation in real-world-asset (RWA) tokenization and onchain capital markets.
“Solana Company’s real, SEC-registered shares will be available on Solana, accessible in a crypto wallet 24/7. That’s the seismic change in capital markets we’re leading at Superstate,” said Robert Leshner, Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder of Superstate. “Today’s announcement is a step forward in the momentum shift bringing public capital markets onchain.”
Opening Bell, launched by Superstate in May 2025, is a regulated onchain issuance platform that allows companies to issue and maintain tokenized equity and fund shares on the Solana blockchain. The platform enables compliant, programmable assets to integrate directly with digital finance ecosystems while preserving institutional-grade controls and transparency.
Pantera Capital, an early investor in Superstate and long-time partner to Solana Company, will support the initiative as part of its broader mission to accelerate institutional adoption of tokenized markets.
The partnership follows Solana Company’s $500 million private investment in public equity (“PIPE”) financing, which[closed](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=2d9yAonE9LzHynf69QBqv12fj0eAjpi0mRIJg3EuXvEoPvzjwcWlyi4tTpIxQq_wDN5WqisNvrmxaD1cqPfgynbh9dIqRg0N6iuMnpliIzIkcblE4i6dnTDD65kZbOYtNscPF9A16rlTLKmyugz3iN3d34GZskz0sjO8pn2qBQGJwR4Ib1AoZEdaHXApT-TFFvEcX-wh5gaVLYDNE7FIoCJPc3QQpqk96Hfqt3AhhIWXJlI_cS-pTuxCnzOVJ20X48k_8x0bZteTtq8t80b3lI85JIqu7QPn4R5QzcA3959RnWk4-RKV9IaLfsgyVQEz)in S

editorial.headline: Huma Finance Unveils 'Defensive Looping' for Institutions at Breakpoint
editorial.standfirst: Huma Finance has introduced 'Huma Multiply,' a risk-managed looping protocol designed to onboard institutional capital to on-chain yields. The PayFi network, now processing $1 billion monthly, also revealed a strategic alliance with Obligate and TradeFlow to tokenize global commodity trades.
key_takeaways: Launch of **Huma Multiply** pilot on December 29, featuring 'Defensive Looping' to mitigate impairment, depeg, and negative carry risks.
Strategic partnership with **Obligate** and **TradeFlow** to tokenize the $4.5 trillion commodity market, specifically tracking rare earth minerals.
The network has processed **$8.5 billion** in transactions with **zero defaults** to date, currently growing at a rate of $1 billion per month.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
Huma Finance is moving aggressively to bridge the gap between stablecoin liquidity and the $30 trillion global trade finance market. Co-founder Erbil Karaman positioned the network not merely as a payment rail, but as an embedded finance layer for global logistics and cross-border settlements. With **$8.5 billion** in cumulative transaction volume and a spotless credit record, Huma is now pivoting to solve the primary barrier for institutional capital in DeFi: risk management.

The core announcement, **Huma Multiply**, addresses the volatility inherent in DeFi yield strategies. While retail users have embraced "looping"—leveraging assets like Huma's **PST** token on lending protocols like **Kamino** and **Jupiter**—institutions have remained sidelined by liquidation risks. Huma's new "Defensive Looping" architecture, launching its pilot on December 29, introduces three specific safeguards: a reserve fund to cover underlying asset impairment, an arbitrage bot to synchronize primary and secondary market pegs, and a "Vault Watchdog" that dynamically adjusts leverage to prevent negative carry when borrowing costs spike.

Beyond yield mechanics, Huma is deepening its integration into the physical economy through a strategic partnership with **Obligate** and **TradeFlow**. This collaboration aims to tokenize the $4.5 trillion commodity trade sector, providing stablecoin liquidity to supply chains for rare earth minerals. Unlike theoretical RWA projects, this initiative promises fully digitized, end-to-end visibility, embedding financial services directly into the containers moving goods globally.

The rapid scaling of Huma's ecosystem—now adding **$1 billion** in volume monthly—validates the "PayFi" thesis: that stablecoins are most valuable when utilized for financing rather than simple settlement. By isolating institutions from the technical risks of DeFi while offering access to yields derived from real-world economic activity, Huma is effectively building a compliant, on-chain alternative to traditional correspondent banking and trade finance facilities.
